en: Bless the LORD, O my soul! O LORD my God, you are very great! You are clothed with splendor and majesty,
zh: 我的心哪！你要稱頌耶和華； 耶和華我的 神啊！你真偉大； 你以尊榮和威嚴為衣服。

en: covering yourself with light as with a garment, stretching out the heavens like a tent.
zh: 你披上亮光好像披上外袍； 展開諸天好像鋪張帳幔。

en: He lays the beams of his chambers on the waters; he makes the clouds his chariot; he rides on the wings of the wind;
zh: 你在水上立起你樓閣的棟梁； 你以雲彩為戰車； 乘駕風的翅膀而行。

en: he makes his messengers winds, his ministers a flaming fire.
zh: 你用風作你的使者， 用火燄作你的僕役。

en: He set the earth on its foundations, so that it should never be moved.
zh: 你把大地堅立在根基上， 使地永永遠遠不動搖。

en: You covered it with the deep as with a garment; the waters stood above the mountains.
zh: 你用深水像衣服一般覆蓋大地， 使眾水高過群山。

en: At your rebuke they fled; at the sound of your thunder they took to flight.
zh: 因你的斥責，水就退去； 因你的雷聲，水就奔逃。

en: The mountains rose, the valleys sank down to the place that you appointed for them.
zh: 眾水流經群山，向下流往眾谷， 流到你為它們指定的地方。

en: You set a boundary that they may not pass, so that they might not again cover the earth.
zh: 你定了界限，使眾水不能越過； 它們不再轉回掩蓋大地。

en: You make springs gush forth in the valleys; they flow between the hills;
zh: 你使泉源在山谷中湧流， 流經群山中間。

en: they give drink to every beast of the field; the wild donkeys quench their thirst.
zh: 使野地所有的走獸有水喝， 野驢得以解渴。

en: Beside them the birds of the heavens dwell; they sing among the branches.
zh: 天上的飛鳥在水邊住宿， 在樹枝上鳴叫。

en: From your lofty abode you water the mountains; the earth is satisfied with the fruit of your work.
zh: 你從自己的樓閣中澆灌群山， 因你所作的事的果效，大地就豐足。

en: You cause the grass to grow for the livestock and plants for man to cultivate, that he may bring forth food from the earth
zh: 你為了牲畜使青草滋生， 為了人的需用使蔬菜生長， 使糧食從地裡生出；

en: and wine to gladden the heart of man, oil to make his face shine and bread to strengthen man's heart.
zh: 又有酒使人心歡喜， 有油使人容光煥發， 有糧加添人的心力。

en: The trees of the LORD are watered abundantly, the cedars of Lebanon that he planted.
zh: 耶和華的樹，就是他所栽種的黎巴嫩香柏樹， 都得到了充分的灌溉。

en: In them the birds build their nests; the stork has her home in the fir trees.
zh: 雀鳥在上面築巢； 至於鶴，松樹是牠的家。

en: The high mountains are for the wild goats; the rocks are a refuge for the rock badgers.
zh: 高山是野山羊的住所； 巖石是石貛藏身的地方。

en: He made the moon to mark the seasons; the sun knows its time for setting.
zh: 你造月亮為定節令； 太陽知道何時沉落。

en: You make darkness, and it is night, when all the beasts of the forest creep about.
zh: 你安設黑暗，有了晚上， 林中的百獸就都爬出來。

en: The young lions roar for their prey, seeking their food from God.
zh: 少壯獅子吼叫覓食， 要尋求從 神而來的食物。

en: When the sun rises, they steal away and lie down in their dens.
zh: 太陽升起的時候， 牠們就躲避， 回到自己的洞穴躺臥。

en: Man goes out to his work and to his labor until the evening.
zh: 人出去作工， 勞碌直到晚上。

en: O LORD, how manifold are your works! In wisdom have you made them all; the earth is full of your creatures.
zh: 耶和華啊！你所造的真是眾多。 它們都是你用智慧造成的； 全地充滿你所造的東西。

en: Here is the sea, great and wide, which teems with creatures innumerable, living things both small and great.
zh: 那裡有海，又大又廣； 海裡有無數的活物， 大小活物都有。

en: There go the ships, and Leviathan, which you formed to play in it.
zh: 那裡有船隻往來航行， 有你所造的大魚， 在海裡嬉戲。

en: These all look to you, to give them their food in due season.
zh: 這些活物都仰望你， 仰望你按時賜給牠們食物。

en: When you give it to them, they gather it up; when you open your hand, they are filled with good things.
zh: 你賜給牠們，牠們就拾取； 你張開你的手，牠們就飽享美物。

en: When you hide your face, they are dismayed; when you take away their breath, they die and return to their dust.
zh: 你向牠們掩面，牠們就驚慌； 你收回牠們的氣息，牠們就死亡，歸回塵土。

en: When you send forth your Spirit, they are created, and you renew the face of the ground.
zh: 你發出你的靈，萬物就被造成； 你也使地面更換一新。

en: May the glory of the LORD endure forever; may the LORD rejoice in his works,
zh: 願耶和華的榮耀存到永遠； 願耶和華喜悅他自己所作的。

en: who looks on the earth and it trembles, who touches the mountains and they smoke!
zh: 他注視大地，地就震動； 他觸摸群山，山就冒煙。

en: I will sing to the LORD as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have being.
zh: 我一生要向耶和華歌唱； 我還在世的時候，我要向我的 神歌頌。

en: May my meditation be pleasing to him, for I rejoice in the LORD.
zh: 願我的默想蒙他喜悅； 我要因耶和華歡喜。

en: Let sinners be consumed from the earth, and let the wicked be no more! Bless the LORD, O my soul! Praise the LORD!
zh: 願罪人從世上滅絕， 也不再有惡人存在。 我的心哪！你要稱頌耶和華。 你們要讚美耶和華。
